title: Manufacturing Engineer - Alstom India Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Alstom India Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Alstom India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alstom India Holdings Services:
Alstom India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India Holdings Services!
